description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional sofa with a modern design, upholstered in a textured dark gray fabric. The sofa features multiple individual seat and back cushions, each with a boxy, uniform appearance, and is accented by several throw pillows in shades of blue and light gray. The armrests are wide, straight, and padded, matching the height of the backrest and providing a cohesive, streamlined look. The sofa sits low to the ground, with its legs either recessed or hidden from view, giving it a grounded and substantial presence. The upholstery has a subtle woven texture, adding visual interest without any overt patterns or decorative stitching. This piece is designed for comfort and communal seating, suitable for urban environments such as apartment lounges, lobbies, or public waiting areas.
description: A large, L-shaped sectional sofa in dark gray textured fabric with multiple cushions and accent pillows, featuring wide, padded armrests and a modern, low-profile design.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full L-shape, seat and back cushions, and a mix of blue and gray throw pillows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended chaise section, armrest, and the arrangement of cushions and pillows along the longer segment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uniform backrest height and the continuous, boxy shape of the sofa's back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the shorter segment, armrest, and the distribution of accent pillows.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six individual seat cushions and six matching back cushions, all boxy and uniform in size, with five loose throw pillows in blue and light gray distributed along the back and sides.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight, and padded armrests at both ends of the L-shape, matching the height of the backrest and featuring a simple, modern profile with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a recessed or hidden base design that gives the sofa a low, grounded appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest at a medium height, segmented by individual back cushions, with no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a subtle woven texture, no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
